caption: The video depicts a formal meeting of the House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs, held on April 12, 2019, focusing on S.23, a bill to increase the minimum wage. The scene shows a group of individuals seated around a conference table, engaged in discussion. A man with a beard and glasses, dressed in a suit, is actively speaking and gesturing with his hands, likely presenting arguments or explaining points related to the bill. Other committee members, including both men and women, are attentively listening and taking notes. The setting includes various items on the table such as water bottles, coffee cups, and documents, indicating a professional and organized environment. The atmosphere suggests a serious and focused debate on the legislative matter at hand.
